code: import{useState}from'react';import{useDispatch,useSelector}from'react-redux';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{setUser}from'../store/authSlice';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Header=()=>{const dispatch=useDispatch();const navigate=useNavigate();const{role}=useSelector(state=>state.auth.user);const[dropdownOpen,setDropdownOpen]=useState(false);const handleLogout=()=>{dispatch(setUser({role:null}));localStorage.removeItem('userRole');navigate('/login');};const getRoleDisplay=()=>{switch(role){case'user':return'Player';case'vendor':return'Vendor';case'admin':return'Admin';default:return'Guest';}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("header",{className:"bg-blue-600 text-white p-4 flex justify-between items-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-lg font-bold",children:"Indoor Sports Booking System"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"relative",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{onClick:()=>setDropdownOpen(!dropdownOpen),className:"flex items-center space-x-2 hover:bg-blue-700 px-3 py-2 rounded",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"w-8 h-8 bg-white text-blue-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold",children:getRoleDisplay().charAt(0)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:getRoleDisplay()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("svg",{className:"w-4 h-4",fill:"none",stroke:"currentColor",viewBox:"0 0 24 24",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("path",{strokeLinecap:"round",strokeLinejoin:"round",strokeWidth:"2",d:"M19 9l-7 7-7-7"})})]}),dropdownOpen&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-md shadow-lg z-10",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"py-1",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleLogout,className:"block w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100",children:"Logout"})})})]})]});};export default Header;
